# Security Policy

## Vulnerability Reporting Policy
If you discover a security vulnerability within this project, please send an email to security@ultimate-phoenix-protocol-ssi.com. All security vulnerabilities will be promptly addressed.

## Best Practices for Users and Developers
- Always keep your dependencies up to date.
- Follow coding standards and guidelines to ensure code quality.
- Use secure coding practices to avoid vulnerabilities.
- Regularly audit your code for security issues.

## Security Features Description
- **Authentication:** The system uses strong authentication methods to ensure that only authorized users can access sensitive information.
- **Encryption:** All data is encrypted both in transit and at rest to protect against unauthorized access.
- **Regular Security Audits:** We conduct regular security audits to identify and mitigate potential vulnerabilities.
